hero.text: Embrace the unknown; it's where the magic happens.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Today is a day filled with energy; harness it and take action.
aries.love: Passion ignites today, making it a perfect time for deep conversations.
aries.career: Opportunities for leadership may present themselves; step up.

taurus.general: Stability is key today; focus on your foundations.
taurus.love: A surprise may bring joy to your relationship.
taurus.career: Perseverance will yield results; keep pushing through.

gemini.general: Communication flows easily; share your ideas.
gemini.love: Open discussions this evening will strengthen bonds.
gemini.career: A collaborative project may open new doors.

cancer.general: Intuition guides your decisions today; trust it.
cancer.love: Nurturing your partner will deepen your connection.
cancer.career: Focus on teamwork; your empathy shines at work.

leo.general: Your charisma brings people together; enjoy the spotlight.
leo.love: Romantic gestures will make the day special.
leo.career: Be bold; your ideas can inspire others.

virgo.general: Details matter today; take time to perfect your tasks.
virgo.love: A thoughtful gesture will strengthen your relationship.
virgo.career: Analyze your goals; clarity will lead to success.

libra.general: Balance and harmony will be your guiding principles today.
libra.love: Compromise will help resolve lingering issues.
libra.career: Networking could open unexpected avenues for progress.

scorpio.general: Your passion can inspire others; don't hold back.
scorpio.love: Emotional honesty will deepen your connection.
scorpio.career: Trust your instincts when making critical decisions.

sagittarius.love: Bring excitement into your relationship; surprise your partner.
sagittarius.career: Innovative ideas will shine; share them with confidence.

capricorn.general: Focus on your long-term goals; persistence is essential.
capricorn.love: A mature conversation can lead to better understanding.
capricorn.career: Your hard work will be recognized; be ready for praise.

aquarius.general: Creative thinking will lead the way; think outside the box.
aquarius.love: Friendship will blossom into something deeper.
aquarius.career: Advocate for your ideas; originality is your strength.

pisces.general: Imagination runs high; let it inspire your actions.
pisces.love: Share your dreams; vulnerability will strengthen your bond.
pisces.career: Trust the flow; your adaptiveness will be crucial today.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Your time is limited, so don’t waste it living someone else’s life.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
motivation.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
motivation.author: Charles Kingsleigh

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Life is a journey, not a destination.
captions.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

captions.text: Be the change you wish to see in the world.
captions.author: Mahatma Gandhi

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Technology is a useful servant but a dangerous master.
tech.author: Christian Lous Lange

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The advance of technology is based on making it fit in so that you don't even even notice it, so it's part of everyday life.
tech.author: Bill Gates

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: When nothing goes right, go left.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I am on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: If you think you are too small to be effective, you have never been in bed with a mosquito.
fun.author: Betty Reese

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Where there is faith, there is love; where there is love, there is peace.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie ten Boom

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu
